title: Vilfa eminens
taxonomy: Vilfa eminens is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Vilfa, which is part of the subfamily Pooideae. The genus Vilfa is a group of grasses native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics. As a member of the Poaceae family, Vilfa eminens is closely related to other grasses.
